title: mentha longifolia var. pellita
intro: Mentha longifolia var. pellita, also known as Woolly Horned Mint, is a subspecies of the Mentha longifolia plant, characterized by its woolly leaves and distinctive horn-like protrusions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which are derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of Woolly Horned Mint include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and menstrual cramps, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Woolly Horned Mint is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
